name: QuestBridge National Match Scholarship
amount: Full four-year scholarship (tuition, room, board, fees) at matched college

eligibility.citizenship: U.S. citizen, permanent resident, or undocumented (DACA and non-DACA)
eligibility.other_requirements: Must be a high school senior; strong academic record; demonstrated financial need; typically household income under $65,000 (some flexibility to ~$100,000)

stackable_notes: The scholarship IS the institutional aid package — it is provided by the partner college, not stacked on top. Students matched to a college receive the partner institution's full-ride commitment. No stacking concern since it replaces need-based institutional aid comprehensively.
notes: QuestBridge is not a traditional scholarship — it is a matching process connecting low-income high-achievers with ~50 elite partner colleges that commit to full funding. Students rank up to 12 colleges and are 'matched' via a binding process similar to Early Decision. Undocumented students are eligible at many partner schools, making this one of few national programs with that feature.
